title: Spot bitcoin ETFs won't be derailed as SEC reportedly details concerns, crypto insiders say
text: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission isn't satisfied with a wave of applications filed this month for spot bitcoin BTCUSD, +0.00% exchange-traded funds, The Wall Street Journal reported Friday.

title: Bitcoin slips after SEC reportedly calls ETF filings inadequate, but still heads for a winning month
text: Bitcoin slipped after the SEC reportedly called recent spot bitcoin ETF filings inadequate.

title: BlackRock Debuts First Buffer ETFs With Launch of Two Funds
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--BlackRock debuted today its first buffer ETFs with the launch of the iShares Large Cap Moderate Buffer ETF (Cboe: IVVM) and the iShares Large Cap Deep Buffer ETF (Cboe: IVVB). Each ETF offers investors an efficient tool for seeking clearer financial outcomes and is designed to balance upside participation with less drawdown risk. “Whether you are nearing retirement or a first-time investor, market volatility remains a top concern for investors,” said Dominik Rohe, Hea.

title: BlackRock launches its first ‘buffer' ETFs for stock-market investors worried about a potential fall
text: BlackRock is launching its first “buffer” exchange-traded funds, which are designed to give investors some downside protection in the U.S. stock market as well as potential gains with a cap.

title: Fidelity files new spot bitcoin ETF application, following BlackRock, Invesco
text: Fidelity Digital Assets has filed an application for a spot bitcoin exchange traded fund, after its previous filing was rejected by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission in 2022. Fidelity's latest move follows similar filings by BlackRock, Invesco, Wisdom Tree, Valkyrie, and Bitwise.

title: BlackRock to Report Second Quarter 2023 Earnings on July 14th
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE: BLK) today announced that it will report second quarter 2023 earnings prior to the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on Friday, July 14, 2023. Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Laurence D. Fink, President, Robert S. Kapito, and Chief Financial Officer, Martin S. Small, will host a teleconference call for investors and analysts at 7:30 a.m. ET. BlackRock's earnings release and supplemental materials will be available via the investor rel.

title: Here's where BlackRock sees investment opportunities in ‘new macro regime'
text: Investors have entered “a new macro regime” with monetary policy that probably will be “tight” for the long term and is shifting market opportunities in an unfriendly backdrop for broad asset-class returns, according to BlackRock's 2023 midyear outlook report.

title: BlackRock points to AI as a ‘mega force' shaping investment opportunities
text: BlackRock has jumped on the recent artificial intelligence (AI) bandwagon, describing the technology as a “mega force” shaping the macro regime and investment opportunities in a new research report. “We implement an overweight to AI as a mega force,” the asset management firm said in its 2023 midyear outlook report published on Wednesday.

title: Cathie Wood's Ark made this change to its bitcoin ETF filing. Here's why it matters
text: Cathie Wood's ARK Investment Management and crypto asset manager 21Shares amended their application for a spot bitcoin exchange traded fund to include a surveillance sharing agreement, which was similar to that in BlackRock's filing earlier this month.

title: BlackRock: A Buffett-Style Anti-Stupid Blue-Chip Buy
text: BlackRock, Inc. is the global king of asset managers, with a long growth runway ahead, offering a very conservative 2.9% yield and growing 11-12% long-term. The company is currently 10% undervalued, with 13% to 14% long-term return potential compared to the S&P 500's 10.2%. BlackRock has exceptional risk management, ranking in the top 18% of the world's highest-quality companies, making it a solid Buffett-style blue-chip buy.

title: BlackRock: Why This Compounding Machine Is A Buy
text: BlackRock is the world's largest asset manager, controlling over $9 trillion in customer assets through various funds and 401k plans. The company operates in the shadow banking industry, providing credit and liquidity through non-bank entities like private equity, hedge funds, and asset managers. BlackRock has a strong business model, consistent revenue and earnings growth, impressive capital return policy, and solid returns on invested capital, making it an attractive long-term investment opportunity.

title: BlackRock® Canada Announces June Cash Distributions for the iShares® ETFs and a Reinvested Distribution for iShares Canadian Real Return Bond Index ETF
text: TORONTO, June 16, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BlackRock Asset Management Canada Limited (“BlackRock Canada”), an indirect, wholly-owned subsidiary of BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE: BLK), today announced the June 2023 cash distributions for the iShares ETFs listed on the TSX or Cboe Canada which pay on a monthly, quarterly, or semi-annual basis as well as a reinvested distribution for iShares Canadian Real Return Bond Index ETF. Unitholders of record of a fund on June 27, 2023, will receive distributions payable in respect of that fund on June 30, 2023.

title: Why BlackRock is reportedly close to applying for Bitcoin ETF, despite regulatory pressure on crypto?
text: BlackRock, the world's largest asset manager, is reportedly close to filing an application for a bitcoin ETF, or exchange traded fund, according to a CoinDesk report Thursday citing a person familiar with the matter.

title: Blackrock to apply for bitcoin exchange-traded fund, CoinDesk reports
text: BlackRock will apply for a bitcoin exchange-traded fund (ETF) in the near future, according to reporting from CoinDesk.  The largest asset manager in the world plans to use Coinbase Custody (the exchange's offline storage solution) for the ETF and its spot market data for pricing, the report noted, citing a source familiar with the matter.

title: BlackRock reportedly close to filing for Bitcoin ETF
text: BlackRock (NYSE: BLK), the global asset manager, is reportedly close to filing for a Bitcoin ETF. As reported by CoinDesk, sources close to BlackRock have indicated that the world's leading asset manager is looking to use Coinbase (NASDAQ: COIN) Custody.

title: BlackRock CEO Fink says he does not plan to leave the firm 'any time soon'

title: Nicholas Ward's Dividend Growth Portfolio: April And May Review
text: My passive income stream increased by 25.59% YoY in April 2023 and 40.02% YoY in May 2023, with a year-to-date growth of 29.99%. I have been taking advantage of high yields on money market funds and short-term treasury ETFs, transitioning about 6.5% of my total portfolio value from a 0% yield into a high-yielding position. I have been making selective reinvestments and trades to increase my passive income stream and accelerate my journey towards financial freedom.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - Passively Outpacing The Market

The portfolio gained 1.84% in May, outperforming the S&P 500 by 1.40%. Year-to-date the portfolio is up 6.66% and trailing the S&P 500 by 2.99%. Since inception, the portfolio is generating alpha over the S&P 500.

title: BlackRock, Inc. to Acquire Private Debt Manager Kreos Capital
text: LONDON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--BlackRock Inc.
